Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 1 17 0}Oh, {f 4 1}. I was just looking for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 2 17 0}This came for you. It's from Hayase.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 3 17 0}I bet his school is sorry he's gone. He was a heck of an athlete.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 4 17 0}But it's good news for us. Now there's nothing standing between us and total victory![n]{f 1 1}
